decoder_capabilities: Returns real DecodedInstruction values for the executable slice.
Decodes SGPR, inline integer, and literal sources for S_MOV_B32 and V_MOV_B32.
execution_capabilities: Accepts S_NOP as a no-op seed instruction.
Executes scalar move and scalar immediate move.
still_scaffolded: Route-matched but non-executable phase-0 compute instructions still return selector-aware stub errors.
